summary: Attempted to reproduce 'cannot login/signin' bug reported by user via end-to-end Playwright on the live preview URL. Could NOT reproduce — BOTH demo login AND real-user login work flawlessly: token saved to localStorage, hard redirect to /dashboard, /api/auth/me returns 200, and the dashboard renders fully ('Welcome Back, Johnny' / 'Welcome Back, Demo'). Backend auth endpoints all returned 200. Pre-existing console error 'TypeError: e is not a function' is still firing on every page mount but is NOT blocking the auth flow.

console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.error: TypeError: e is not a function at bundle.js:776319 inside `la.initialize`
console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.impact: NONE on auth flow — login + redirect + /api/auth/me all succeed. Likely a 3rd-party SDK init failure (Privy/Phantom/Agora). Worth a deep-dive in a future cleanup pass but is NOT the cause of any login symptom.
console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.suspect_source: One of the wallet/auth SDKs in the provider tree (PrivyAuthProvider / PhantomConnectProvider / SolanaWalletProvider / LedgerSignerProvider) — try unwrapping providers one at a time and source-mapping bundle.js:776319 to find the exact module.

console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.impact: NONE — Emergent platform iframe artifact, not app code.

console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.error: 404s on the dashboard (2 resources) + WS close-before-connect on /api/ws/vibe-phone & /api/ws/friend-events
console_noise_observed_but_not_blocking_.impact: Cosmetic — does not affect auth or dashboard render.

1_demo_login.dashboard_rendered: YES — 'Welcome Back, Demo' + all 6 universe cards

2_real_user_login.dashboard_rendered: YES — 'Welcome Back, Johnny' + all universe cards

3_login_page_mount.page_errors: 0 (only console-level errors noted above; nothing crashes React)

action_items: TELL THE USER: backend + frontend auth flow are 100% working in headless Chrome against the live preview URL. Login flow is NOT broken in this environment.

Ask the user for: (a) the exact email they're using, (b) a screenshot of the /login screen with browser devtools Network tab open showing the POST /api/auth/login request + response, (c) browser + OS, (d) whether they're on the preview URL or a custom domain, (e) whether they have a stale auth_token in localStorage that's failing /api/auth/me silently. A console screenshot would be ideal.

Optional cleanup (not the cause of the reported bug): track down 'TypeError: e is not a function' at bundle.js:776319 inside `la.initialize` — likely Privy/Phantom/Agora SDK init failing on a missing config; doesn't break auth but is noisy and could mask real bugs in future regressions.
Optional: the dashboard fires /api/auth/me FOUR times on mount — could be deduped with a single AuthProvider context to reduce load.
Optional: WebSocket /api/ws/vibe-phone and /api/ws/friend-events close before connection on the dashboard — verify backend WS handlers are actually mounted at those paths.
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.tsx is solid: 15s AbortController timeout, auth_in_progress flag to gate versionManager reload, hard window.location.href redirect on demo login to bypass any stuck React transition, localStorage cleared then re-set on success. No defects spotted.
Backend invariant (Bearer-before-cookie in get_current_user) appears intact — /api/auth/me succeeds with the freshly-issued Bearer token immediately after both login flows.
data-testid='login-demo-btn' present and clickable. data-testid coverage on email/password inputs would be a nice-to-have but selectors by name='email'/name='password' worked fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login is working end-to-end in headless Chrome on the preview URL as of this iteration. If the user re-reports the bug, ASK FOR A SCREENSHOT before re-testing — symptom is environment-specific (likely stale localStorage token, browser extension, or a custom domain CORS issue, none of which reproduce in our test env). Do NOT chase 'TypeError: e is not a function' — it's a 3rd-party SDK init noise, not the auth bug.
rca_of_the_issue: UNABLE TO REPRODUCE. Demo login → 200, /dashboard renders. Real user login (johnnyh3611@gmail.com/FreshStart2026!) → 200, /dashboard renders with correct user name. Token persists in localStorage, /api/auth/me succeeds. The reported symptom is NOT present in our test environment. Most likely user-side cause: stale auth_token in localStorage from a previous deploy, browser extension blocking POST, or they're hitting a different (cached) frontend bundle. Recommend: have the user clear localStorage (`localStorage.clear()` in devtools) and try again, OR send a screenshot/HAR so we can diagnose the actual symptom they're seeing.
